New Arrival, French High-End Custom Chane1
A# Chane1 24c mini Calfskin Small Crossbody, multiple carrying styles: handbag, crossbody, or backpack.
The leather is calfskin, very durable, and the capacity is good. A classic minimalist style, simply perfect.

items.name_en: New Arrival: CE Smile Bag for Spring/Summer 2026
items.name_cn:
New Arrival: CE Smile Bag for Spring/Summer 2026
CE Smile Bag returns with a fresh look!
CE PRINTEMPS 2026 Spring Collection!
NEW LAGE
The classic memory, reborn!
Lightweight material, modern lines
Still the It Bag with maximum recognizability!
Exuding a modern, minimalist, and sharp temperament. New Creative Director Michael Rider makes a surprise return with the "Smile Bag" for the Spring/Summer 2026 debut. Smooth, fine, and lustrous leather, saddle stitching, and piping create a soft, rounded horizontal silhouette. The side zipper design presents a unique smile arc, cleverly echoing this beloved name. Reinterpreting classic design through a modern silhouette, it is lighter and more versatile, presenting an elegant yet casual style!
Style No.: 124213
Dimensions: 36.5x12x19cm (Opening)

This season's very eye-catching glossy lambskin.

items.name_en: New Arrival: French High-End Custom Chane1
items.name_cn:
New Arrival: French High-End Custom Chane1
AS4654# Chane1 Mini Full-Diamond Flap Bag, Latest Autumn/Winter Hardware ~ Made with imported lambskin, top craftsmanship, and perfect handiwork!
Effortlessly hold your style for street wear or parties. This metal design took a lot of time and effort, with every detail striving for perfection. Both inside and out are made of lambskin, with a soft and delicate touch.
It looks super good on. Can be carried by hand, over the shoulder, or crossbody, and the strap is detachable.
size:14.5x19.5x8cm
